domain: Spiritual Consulting, Tarot, Numerology, Akashic Records
brand_vibe: Sacred, Feminine, Angelic, Ethereal, Serene, Sisterly

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous (p-8, p-12, p-24, gap-12). Create an airy, breathable experience.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Soft and feminine. Use rounded-2xl or rounded-[2rem] for large cards, rounded-full for buttons.

sections.hero: Full height (min-h-[90vh]). Use the ethereal soft cloud image as a subtle background layer. Central text alignment, highly elegant. Hero image overlaid with maximum bg-white/30 to keep it visible.
sections.services: Asymmetric Bento-style or arch-shaped cards. Solid white cards on the Warm Ivory background, or glassmorphism over subtle gradient blobs.
sections.booking: Clean Shadcn components heavily customized: rounded corners, Peach Gold ring colors, Deep Lavender selected states.
sections.testimonials: Horizontal scrolling marquee using react-fast-marquee or Swiper, clean typography, soft blush or ivory card backgrounds.

surfaces_and_shadows.header: Crystal glass variant: bg-[#FBF4E8]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#EBB99A]/20

buttons.primary: bg-[#6B5B95] text-white hover:bg-[#5A4C7E] shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(107,91,149,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FBF4E8] text-[#6B5B95] border border-[#6B5B95]/20 hover:bg-[#EBB99A]/10 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for premium smooth scrolling.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for hero elements using Framer Motion (y: 20 -> y: 0).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift up (-translate-y-2) with a softer, wider shadow. Buttons scale up slightly (scale: 1.02).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Include floating sparkles (SVG or Framer Motion) near the hero heading and 'Book Now' CTA. Gentle, slow-moving elements.

content_structure.navigation: Logo on left, Links (About, Services, Testimonials, FAQ) centered, 'Book Reading' CTA on right. Sticky glassmorphism header.
content_structure.hero: Headline: 'Guiding You to Light'. Subhead: 'Discover your true path with Jenika Bhayani—Gujarat's celebrity Tarot Card Reader and Akashic Records Consultant.'
content_structure.about: Highlight: 7+ Years, 5,000+ Clients, 200+ Google Reviews. Incorporate photo of Jenika. Text: 'Welcome to my tarot card reading services...'
content_structure.booking_flow: Users select a service -> Shadcn DatePicker/Calendar -> Time slot -> Collect info (Name, Email, Phone, Birth Details) -> Razorpay integration.
content_structure.testimonials: Highlight Paridhi, Bhagyshree, Parul, Reena. Display 5-star icons.
content_structure.trust_badges: Visual strip displaying: '200+ Google Reviews | 1000+ IG Testimonials | 5000+ Clients | Celebrity Reader'
content_structure.admin_dashboard: Password protected (/admin). Uses Shadcn UI Table to list upcoming bookings. Needs clean 'Pastel & Soft' customized shadcn styles.

components_and_libraries.icons: lucide-react (thin, 1.5 stroke width for elegant feel)
components_and_libraries.ui_components: shadcn/ui (heavily restyled for pastel theme. Round corners to rounded-xl, remove harsh black borders, replace with subtle #EBB99A/30 borders)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is readable on ivory. Deep Lavender (#6B5B95) passes against Warm Ivory (#FBF4E8).
accessibility.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid on all buttons, form inputs, booking flow steps, and service cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup standard React + Vite + Tailwind project. Include Lora and Poppins from Google Fonts.
2. Add framer-motion and react-lenis for premium smooth scrolling.
3. Overwrite tailwind.config.js with the exact hex codes provided in 'colors'.
4. Build the landing page using pure HTML/Tailwind for the layout, applying generous padding and feminine arched shapes for imagery.
5. Do NOT use generic purple gradients. Use Warm Ivory background and soft Deep Lavender/Peach Gold solid colors or extremely subtle radial glows.
6. Build the booking flow leveraging Shadcn components (Dialog, Calendar, Form, Select). Strip out default Vercel-look borders/shadows and apply soft pastels and rounded edges.
7. Integrate a mock Razorpay flow or standard Razorpay checkout structure.
8. Build a protected /admin route showing a Shadcn data table of bookings.
9. Use the provided media URLs exclusively. Do not use placeholder images.
10. Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements for testing.
